title: Kofi and the Sleepy Animals
synopsis: Little Kofi walks through the warm savanna at sunset, discovering different animals settling down for the night. A gentle bedtime story perfect for toddlers.

pages.text: The sun is going down. Kofi walks in the warm grass.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing a little boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through golden savanna grass. The orange sunset fills the sky with bold confident strokes and warm colors.
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through golden grass at sunset

pages.text: Look! A big elephant is drinking water. Splash, splash!

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watching a large expressive elephant drinking from a watering hole. Warm savanna colors dominate with thick brushstrokes creating the golden grass background.
illustration.alt: Kofi watching an elephant drink water

pages.text: The giraffe stretches his long neck up, up, up to eat leaves.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with bold confident strokes depicting Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes looking up at a tall giraffe reaching for acacia tree leaves. The orange sunset creates warm lighting across the savanna scene.
illustration.alt: Kofi looking up at a giraffe eating leaves

pages.text: Two zebras run fast across the grass. Their stripes flash in the sun.

illustration.description: A dynamic gouache painting showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watching two expressive zebras galloping through golden grass. Thick brushstrokes capture movement while warm savanna colors fill the scene.
illustration.alt: Kofi watching zebras run across the grassland

pages.text: A sleepy lion yawns. It's time for bed.

illustration.description: A soft gouache painting with textured painterly strokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes near a yawning lion. The orange sunset creates a drowsy atmosphere with warm savanna colors throughout.
illustration.alt: Kofi near a yawning lion at sunset

pages.text: Kofi yawns too. Good night, animals! Good night, sun!

illustration.description: A peaceful gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes yawning as he waves goodbye. The orange sunset fades behind silhouettes of savanna animals, painted with bold confident strokes in warm colors.
illustration.alt: Kofi yawning and waving goodbye at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What does the elephant do?
questions.explanation: The elephant drinks water and makes splash sounds.

questions.question: What does the giraffe eat?
questions.explanation: The giraffe stretches up high to eat leaves from trees.

questions.question: What does the lion do when it's sleepy?
questions.explanation: The sleepy lion yawns because it's time for bed.
